[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010111 5
1 0011110 4
2 0001001 2
3 0000000 a
4 1001000 2
5 0101001 3
6 1011001 4
7 0111001 4

01 10 1101001 4
12 21 1111001 5
23 32 1111001 5
34 43 1111011 6
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1011111 6
67 76 0011111 5
70 07 1001001 3

02 20 1011001 4 match 6
13 31 0111001 4 match 7
24 42 1111011 6
35 53 1111111 a
46 64 1111110 6
57 75 1011111 6
60 06 1011110 5
71 17 0101001 3 match 5

14 41 1101011 5

47 74 1101011 5
50 05 1011111 6
61 16 0111111 6
72 27 1011001 4 match 6

15 51 1111111 a
